section_title: 1. After Babel: The Migrations to the Western Lands
change_summary: Tagged all numeric dates with '(conventional estimate)'.
Added a parenthetical definition for 'Maghreb' and 'aridification'.
Converted the 'Think It Through' section into a 'Data Task: Analyzing Rock Art' with analysis questions.

Revised several long sentences to improve readability based on initial audit feedback.
notes: Initial audit score was a pass at 83. I proactively edited several long sentences flagged in the report to improve flow before finalizing this audit.
